overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking from an urban intersection into a palm-tree lined city park with a scenic lake. The character passes pedestrians and benches while the downtown skyline remains visible in the background throughout the sunny afternoon stroll.

events.description: black SUV drives past from left to right while character waits at crosswalk
character steps off asphalt crosswalk onto park pathway

agents.ego_description: walking across the multi-lane intersection toward the park entrance

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection

entered.detail: low-rise commercial strip with flat roofs and large windows
tall palm trees lining the street
large advertising billboard with digital display
white striped pedestrian crossing on asphalt
standard traffic signal pole at intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The character begins at an urban intersection with palm-lined streets and commercial buildings in the background. After a black SUV passes, the character crosses the white-striped crosswalk, transitioning from the asphalt road toward a grassy park area.

events.description: character passes from urban street into tree-covered park area

agents.ego_description: walking along the gravel path into the park, passing a woman in a yellow dress

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress walking toward the camera then passing by

entered.detail: curved gravel walking path through landscaped grass
black metal park bench with person sitting
calm reflective lake surface becoming visible through trees
tall glass skyscrapers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a landscaped park area with gravel paths and scattered palm trees. Passing a woman in a yellow dress and a man on a bench, the view opens to reveal a lake on the left with the downtown skyline visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside promenade with palm tree canopy

events.description: character slows slightly to navigate around pedestrians near the water's edge

agents.ego_description: strolling along the curved lakeside path, observing the water and skyline views

notable_agents.action: person standing at the water's edge appearing to fish or observe the lake

entered.detail: boulder landscaping along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the scenic lakeside promenade surrounded by dense palm trees. The calm water reflects the afternoon sun and downtown skyline while a few pedestrians stroll along the path. Large boulders line the water's edge where a person stands fishing.

scene_state.functional_zone: park pathway adjacent to parking area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the gravel path with the lake now on the right side, passing parked vehicles

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles along the street adjacent to the park
small low-roofed park buildings or restrooms near the water

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the gravel path as the lake recedes into the background. Parked cars line the left side of the path while small utility buildings appear on the right near the water's edge. The downtown skyline remains visible in the distance to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a busy urban intersection into a serene, palm-lined city park. It begins on an asphalt road among commercial buildings, moving across a white-striped crosswalk after a black SUV passes to enter a landscaped area of gravel paths and grass. As the character passes pedestrians and park benches, the view opens up to reveal a calm lake on the left with the downtown skyline looming in the background. The scene then shifts along a scenic lakeside promenade where the water reflects the afternoon sun and a fisherman stands among large boulders at the water's edge. Finally, the camera continues along the gravel path as the lake recedes, passing parked cars and small utility buildings while the distant skyline remains visible to the right.
